title: Phase 6: Database + execute() + Schema-from-YAML
description: Implement Database container with nested dict query interface (execute), cursor-based pagination, field projection, database-level describe/validate diagnostics, and declarative YAML schema loading. See Vision.md for full details.

comments.author: unknown
comments.text: Standup: starting Phase 6 (DB execute + schema-from-YAML). Next: set child stories in progress and plan execution/features. Blockers: none.

comments.author: unknown
comments.text: Standup: Python table/db steps merged; Rust Cucumber suite currently failing due to duplicate helpers/step names after query_gsi changes. Next: clean rust cucumber.rs helpers/imports and update query_gsi call sites; then rerun cargo tests. Blockers: none.

comments.author: unknown
comments.text: Standup: Rust parity done for execute/describe/validate/includes; cucumber suite green. Closed execute basic/indexed/nested include/describe/validate stories. Next: run full make check + parity verification and finalize commit.

comments.text: Coverage 100% in Rust & Python; parity check failing due to missing Rust steps for pagination/schema associations—implementing now.
